Features

Style Smarter, Not Harder

From wardrobe digitization to AI-powered recommendations, Apparely handles the heavy lifting so you can focus on looking great.

Snap Your Wardrobe

Point your camera at any clothing item and watch as AI automatically detects, crops, removes the background, and categorizes it.

Multi-item detection— snap a flat-lay and extract each piece

Chat with Lumina

Tell Lumina where you're going — she'll ask about the setting, time, occasion, and your style mood.

Swipe to Decide

Browse AI-generated outfit combinations Tinder-style. Like it? Swipe right. The more you swipe, the smarter Lumina gets.

Wardrobe Health Score

Get insights into your closet's variety, color balance, and wear frequency. Know what's missing and what you wear too much.

Privacy First

Image analysis runs on-device whenever possible. Your wardrobe photos stay local — we prioritize your privacy.

Upload & Improve

Wore an outfit Lumina suggested? Send her a photo and get color/contrast feedback with concrete tips to level up.

How It Works

From Photo to Fabulous

Three simple steps to unlock your personal AI stylist.

01

Photograph Your Clothes

Snap individual items or a flat-lay of multiple pieces. Our AI detects, crops, and catalogs each item automatically.

+
02

Chat with Lumina

Tell her about your plans. She'll ask about the setting, time, occasion, and your style mood — just like a real stylist.

Where are you heading?
Dinner date downtown
What time? What's the vibe?
03

Get Your Outfit

Swipe through personalized combinations from your own wardrobe. Save favorites, get feedback, and never wonder what to wear again.

✕♥
Pricing

Choose Your Style Level

Start free, upgrade when you're ready for more.

Free

$0/mo

Try before you subscribe

  • Up to 25 wardrobe items
  • 10 AI recommendations/day
  • 5 outfit generations/day
  • 2 health scans/day
  • Cloud AI features
Get Started

Beginner

$5.99/mo

Local AI, unlimited basics

  • Up to 200 wardrobe items
  • Unlimited recommendations
  • Unlimited outfit generations
  • Unlimited health scans
  • Cloud AI features
Subscribe

Intermediate

$9.99/mo

  • Unlimited local AI
  • 300 cloud AI credits/mo
  • Advanced image analysis
  • Priority support

Advanced

Unlimited everything
